'''yanafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrogenics|iatrogenics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrogenics|iatrogenics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yanafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænæfæth|yænæfæth]] || [[word:yænæfæj|yænæfæj]] || [[word:yænæfæsh|yænæfæsh]] || [[word:yænæfæ|yænæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yananafath|yananafath]] || [[word:yananafaj|yananafaj]] || [[word:yananafash|yananafash]] || [[word:yananafa|yananafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanafath|yanafath]] || [[word:yanafaj|yanafaj]] || [[word:yanafash|yanafash]] || [[word:yanafa|yanafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanaffath|yanaffath]] || [[word:yanaffaj|yanaffaj]] || [[word:yanaffash|yanaffash]] || [[word:yanaffaf|yanaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanafatha|yanafatha]] || [[word:yanafaja|yanafaja]] || [[word:yanafasha|yanafasha]] || [[word:yanafaka|yanafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanafath|yanafath]] || [[word:yanafaj|yanafaj]] || [[word:yanafash|yanafash]] || [[word:yanafa|yanafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanafathal|yanafathal]] || [[word:yanafajal|yanafajal]] || [[word:yanafashal|yanafashal]] || [[word:yanafakal|yanafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanafathatha|yanafathatha]] || [[word:yanafajaja|yanafajaja]] || [[word:yanafashasha|yanafashasha]] || [[word:yanafaka|yanafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanafathan|yanafathan]] || [[word:yanafajan|yanafajan]] || [[word:yanafashan|yanafashan]] || [[word:yanafakan|yanafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanafathaoro|yanafathaoro]] || [[word:yanafajaoro|yanafajaoro]] || [[word:yanafashaoro|yanafashaoro]] || [[word:yanafakaoro|yanafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
